variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 14452 K Air Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SA 14452 K Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 14452 K Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 14452 K is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 124.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 104.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 81.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 185.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 178.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P526801 Air Filter, Primary Finned | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14452 K
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P526801 Air Filter, Primary Finned | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14452 K
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Air Filters? Strong, pliable gasket is compressed against the air cleaner housing to create a tight seal. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4502K Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14452 K
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4502K Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 14452 K
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4502K axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
